evals.prompt: Build paper memory for this manuscript.
Extract claims, figures, and evidence from this paper folder.
evals.expected_behavior: Copy claim text verbatim from manuscript; preserve any human-assigned claim IDs.

evals.prompt: I'm starting a rebuttal — give me the claims layer first.
evals.expected_behavior: Write claims.yml even if figures.yml not requested; flag at-risk claims with `risk` field; suggest loading academic-writing-skills next.

evals.prompt: Refresh paper memory; I added two figures.
evals.expected_behavior: Append-only update; preserve existing figure IDs and human-edited captions.
